ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISCHANGED( Escalate__c ) && $Setup.Automation_Settings__c.SB2_Workflow_Enabled__c = TRUE && $Setup.Automation_Settings__c.Super_User_Workflow_Enabled__c =TRUE) && NOT($User.Email = "whp@cloudjungle.co.uk") || (ISNEW() && Escalate__c =TRUE && $Setup.Automation_Settings__c.SB2_Workflow_Enabled__c = TRUE && $Setup.Automation_Settings__c.Super_User_Workflow_Enabled__c =TRUE)&& NOT($User.Email = "whp@cloudjungle.co.uk")
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Tickets cannot be Escalated to CloudJungle, other than by members of the Stormbird Working Group.
